summary: Raw tape capture of a well‑played show; recording is modest but the performance shines through.
review: The reviewer praises the band’s tight playing and enjoys hearing each member on this Halloween night tape, though there are no concrete details about sound clarity. The recording appears to be an audience‑style bootleg (“stealing the noise”), suggesting a raw, possibly noisy source. Overall the musical vibe is positive despite limited technical information.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one vague review; the performance is praised while recording quality is unclear, leading to a moderate combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on clarity; phrase “stealing the noise” implies a raw tape capture with ambient crowd sound and limited fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer does not discuss set structure or pacing.
